title: taraxacum vindobonense
intro: Taraxacum vindobonense, also known as the Vienna dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum vindobonense can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to treat various health conditions.
